car_id: nascar cup series nextgen chevrolet camaro
notes: Confirmed from v2 manual: no steering wheel shift LEDs. Pit speed indicator is graphical tachometer overlay (yellow/green/red). NASCAR Cup Series Next Gen stock car.

car_id: nascar cup series nextgen ford mustang
notes: Confirmed from v2 manual: no steering wheel shift LEDs. Pit speed indicator is graphical tachometer overlay (yellow/green/red). NASCAR Cup Series Next Gen stock car.

car_id: nascar cup series nextgen toyota camry
notes: Confirmed from v2 manual: no steering wheel shift LEDs. Pit speed indicator is graphical tachometer overlay (yellow/green/red). NASCAR Cup Series Next Gen stock car.
Confirmed from v2 manual: no steering wheel shift LEDs. NASCAR Cup Gen4 stock car.

Confirmed from v2 manual: no steering wheel shift LEDs. Spek Pro tachometer has pit speed lights (yellow/green/red for speed vs limit) and a shift light mode that turns the gauge backlight red near rev limiter. Neither system uses a Fanatec LED strip.
Confirmed from v2 manual: no steering wheel shift LEDs. Spek Pro tachometer pit speed indicator only (yellow=below, green=at, red=above limit). NASCAR Craftsman Truck Series.
Confirmed from v2 manual: no steering wheel shift LEDs. ARCA Menards Series stock car — no shift light section in manual.
Confirmed from v2 manual (all 18 pages): no shift light LEDs. Holley EFI digital display only; H-pattern transmission. SRX Series oval racing.

Confirmed from v2 manual: no steering wheel shift LED strip. AIM digital display has dashboard shift lights (L→R green to red, red LED in upper right at optimum RPM) but this is an in-game dash indicator, not the Fanatec strip.
Confirmed from v2 manual: no steering wheel shift LEDs. Oval racing.
